title: Stage demo media directly inside the player .var and seed the packaged player to that in-package media root
summary: 0.4.18 keeps the package-first `.var` seam and extends it so the package can carry a self-contained demo media set. The packaged scene and packaged preset now point at that in-package media folder, which lets us test real `.var`-hosted images and videos without deploying loose runtime media for this slice.
reasoning: The next honest launch boundary is not just a packaged asset, plugin, preset, and demo scene. We also need proof that the player can consume internal package media, because the demo and future pro/demo variants will rely on hardcoded in-package files rather than loose Custom directory media. The existing player already resolves VaM-safe runtime paths and already supports a seeded media root through the scene and preset seams, so the clean move is to copy the chosen demo media into the `.var` and seed those existing paths instead of inventing a second loader.

changes.summary: Adds an optional packaged demo-media stage that copies a selected source directory into the `.var` under `Custom/Images/FrameAngel/Player/demo_media`, flattens the media files into one browser-friendly root, and records the staged media in the package manifest/report.
changes.reasoning: The current player enumerates media from one directory path, not nested package subfolders, so the first packaged-media proof should stage all included demo files into one deterministic in-package folder.

changes.summary: Seeds the packaged CustomUnityAsset preset and the packaged demo scene to the in-package demo-media root when packaged media is included.
changes.reasoning: This keeps the testing seam self-contained and lets `Load Media` start from the package-contained demo set without relying on loose runtime files.

changes.summary: Threads the packaged demo-media source root through the normal foundation package-build script so the same deterministic path can be reused on later releases.
changes.reasoning: The package-first release process should not require manual post-build assembly each time we want a self-contained demo media set.

verification: Stamp version 0.4.18 into `player.version.json` and build the matching player release artifacts through the foundation build in package-only mode.
Copy the selected test media from `F:/sim/vam/Custom/Images/include` into the `.var` under one packaged demo-media root.
Confirm the generated package advances to the next `FrameAngel.Player.<n>.var` public release automatically.
Load the packaged player and demo scene from AddonPackages in live VaM and confirm the package-contained scene, asset, plugin, preset, and demo media load together from the same `.var`.
Use the packaged player `Load Media` path to confirm the in-package demo-media folder is reachable as the seeded runtime media root.
knownIssues: The remaining back-mounted panel crossover on the stable player still needs a follow-up cleanup pass.
Dedicated demo-media shortcuts and richer packaged media browsing can be widened after the first self-contained package-media proof is stable.
